title: 🏥 Ayushman Bharat Health Card: Eligibility, Application and Benefits 🤑
metaTitle: Ayushman Bharat Health Card: Know Eligibility, Application and Benefits
metaDescription: Get detailed information about Ayushman Bharat Health Card, its eligibility, application process, and benefits. 📈

FAQs about Ayushman Bharat Health Card 🤔
intro: The Ayushman Bharat Health Card is a revolutionary initiative by the Government of India to provide health insurance coverage to the economically weaker sections of society. 🌟 With the aim of providing universal health coverage, this scheme has been designed to cater to the medical needs of the underprivileged. In this article, we will delve into the details of the Ayushman Bharat Health Card, its eligibility criteria, application process, and benefits. 📊

sections.heading: Introduction to Ayushman Bharat Health Card 🏦
sections.content: The Ayushman Bharat Health Card, also known as the Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PMJAY), is a flagship scheme of the Government of India. 🇮🇳 It was launched in 2018 with the objective of providing health insurance coverage of up to ₹5 lakh per family per year to over 10 crore poor and vulnerable families. 📈 The scheme is designed to provide financial protection to families against catastrophic health expenditures, thereby reducing the out-of-pocket expenses on healthcare. 🏦

sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for Ayushman Bharat Health Card 📝
sections.content: To be eligible for the Ayushman Bharat Health Card, families must meet certain criteria. ✅ These include: (1) families living below the poverty line, (2) families with no male member between the ages of 16 and 59, (3) families with no able-bodied adult member, (4) families with at least one disabled member, and (5) families living in kutcha houses. 🏠 Additionally, the scheme also covers families who are beneficiaries of the Rashtriya Swasthya Bima Yojana (RSBY). 📊

sections.heading: Application Process for Ayushman Bharat Health Card 📈
sections.content: The application process for the Ayushman Bharat Health Card is relatively simple. 📝 Families can apply for the scheme through various channels, including (1) the official website of the scheme, (2) Common Service Centers (CSCs), and (3) empaneled hospitals. 🏥 To apply, families need to provide certain documents, including (1) a valid ration card, (2) a valid Aadhaar card, and (3) a birth certificate. 📝 Once the application is submitted, it will be verified by the authorities, and the health card will be issued to the eligible families. 📈

sections.heading: Benefits of Ayushman Bharat Health Card 🤑
sections.content: The Ayushman Bharat Health Card offers several benefits to the beneficiaries. 🌟 These include: (1) health insurance coverage of up to ₹5 lakh per family per year, (2) cashless treatment at empaneled hospitals, (3) pre-existing disease coverage, (4) pre- and post-hospitalization expenses coverage, and (5) coverage for diagnostic tests and medicines. 🧬 Additionally, the scheme also provides a helpline number for beneficiaries to seek assistance and resolve any queries. 📞

faqs.q: What is the Ayushman Bharat Health Card?
faqs.a: The Ayushman Bharat Health Card is a health insurance scheme launched by the Government of India to provide health insurance coverage to the economically weaker sections of society.

faqs.q: Who is eligible for the Ayushman Bharat Health Card?
faqs.a: Families living below the poverty line, families with no male member between the ages of 16 and 59, families with no able-bodied adult member, families with at least one disabled member, and families living in kutcha houses are eligible for the scheme.

faqs.q: How can I apply for the Ayushman Bharat Health Card?
faqs.a: Families can apply for the scheme through various channels, including the official website of the scheme, Common Service Centers (CSCs), and empaneled hospitals.
